title: stelis pachypus
intro: Stelis pachypus, also known as the Thick-lipped Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Mexico. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Stelis pachypus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties to combat infections. Herbal preparations of Stelis pachypus are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
